mapper.select: ( SELECT p.product_name AS productName, '입고' AS type, i.inbound_amount AS amount, r.stock_amount AS currentStock, w.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, a.area_code AS areaCode, i.inbound_date AS handledAt FROM inbound_table i JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id JOIN stock_table r ON i.product_id = r.product_id JOIN area_table a ON r.area_id = a.area_id JOIN warehouse_table w ON a.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id ) UNION ALL ( SELECT p.product_name AS productName, '출고' AS type, o.outbound_amount AS amount, r.stock_amount AS currentStock, w.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, a.area_code AS areaCode, o.outbound_date AS handledAt FROM outbound_table o JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.product_id JOIN stock_table r ON o.product_id = r.product_id JOIN area_table a ON r.area_id = a.area_id JOIN warehouse_table w ON a.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id ) ORDER BY handledAt DESC
